case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ISTVAN DELI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
